title: CoreCrates
description: Add customizable crates to your server. Winning effects, percentage chances, and more.
body:
### CORECRATES
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/206d67123fec79f105b44d84d34ad698cd1fb391.jpeg)
### 
### Why CoreCrates? 

**_CoreCrates offers the easiest way to create crates and highly customizable options. You can make customizations every to each crates.._**
# 
### Getting Started
##
>1. To create a crate, use the command `/crates create "Your Crate's name"`. Then, add the rewards to the GUI that opens.
>2. You can make all customizations related to the crate using the `/crates editor` command!
>
> Visit the [Wiki](https://corecrates.gitbook.io/wiki) for more information!
#
### Features
- Custom Crate Visual Effects
  
- Custom Crate Opening Effects
  
- Customizable Crate Name Colors
  
- Custom Drop Rates for Each Item
  
- Crate-Specific Permissions
  
- Customizable Crate Keys
  
- One-Time Use Crates
  
- Crate Reward Previews
  
- Switchable Crate Opening Animations

- Limited Time Crates Feature
  
- Customizable Crate Appearances
- Supported Languages: _English/Turkish_ [You can easily change it via Config.yml!]
- **NOTE**: When trying to lift a physical crate, you might break it while bending down!
#
![CrateOpening](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92dfdfc701a11ebd1f10bc8b517a3d2818117df9.gif)
#

For bugs, suggestions, and other issues, you can reach me on Discord!
